{{Infobox technique
| name = Reading
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Reading Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Reading is a specialized discipline involving the conscious observation and manipulation of [[Intent]], which is the energy or emotion embedded within physical objects and people. Practitioners, known as [[Readers]], use focused willpower and mental effort to sense the history, purpose, or emotional echoes left behind by humans on items ranging from simple notes to weapons. This process can manifest as clear visions of an object's past or merely vague sensory impressions. While most people use [[Intent]] subconsciously, [[Readers]] can tap into it to investigate crimes, craft superior tools, or uncover truths that are otherwise inaccessible. A more advanced and rare technique is active Reading, which allows a practitioner to physically alter or transform an object by twisting its [[Intent]]. This process is similar to [[Awakening]], a method of granting objects increased power, though active Reading is more violent and can lead to destruction if not mastered. Such high-level abilities are extremely scarce within the [[Empire]], held by only a few individuals, including certain [[Magisters]]. Despite their utility, the practice carries significant risks. Attempting to [[Read]] certain entities, such as the [[Great Elders]], can result in immediate insanity due to the overwhelming nature of their minds. [[Readers]] may also suffer from [[Reader burn]], a condition where their abilities exceed their physical constitution. Furthermore, Reading social situations or crowds is dangerous, as a [[Reader]] might be swept up in the collective [[Intent]] of a mob. Due to their unique powers and ability to evade standard legal constraints, [[Readers]] are often subject to close scrutiny and organizational oversight to ensure their reliability.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Reading is a specialized technique utilized by members of the [[Blackwatch]] that involves processing obscure information. [[Calder]] employs this method to focus his mind on specific objects and to sense his ship, which helps him strengthen his [[Intent]]. By applying Reading to the vessel, he can ensure that it accepts new additions. The technique allows a [[Reader]] to witness visions regarding an object's lifetime or its creation, including the ability to see certain past events. [[Calder]] has demonstrated this power by using Reading on the [[aura]] of the [[Gray Island]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Reading]] is a technique used by [[Calder]] to sense the ship and strengthen [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Reading]] is a technique used to ensure a ship accepts new additions.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Reading]] is a technique used by [[Calder]] to focus his mind on an object.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] uses the technique of [[Reading]] on the ship.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Reading]] is a technique used by members of the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Reading]] involves obscure information.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] used the technique of [[Reading]] on the [[aura]] of the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Reading]] is a technique used by [[Readers]] to see visions of an object's creation or lifetime.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] has used a technique called [[Reading]] to see certain events.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Reading]] can provide visions of past events.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Reading is a specialized training discipline for [[Architects]] that requires the practitioner to maintain emotional empathy and openness. This technique allows [[Lucan]] to utilize the power to perceive the history contained within various objects. It serves several practical functions, such as being used to invest items like [[Tristania]]'s coat to provide protection against bullets. Additionally, the technique is potentially employed to maintain the structural integrity of the [[Council of Architects]]' ceiling.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Reading]] is a technique potentially used to keep the [[Council of Architects]]' ceiling in one piece.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Reading]] is a technique used to invest objects like [[Tristania]]'s coat to stop bullets.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Reading]] is a training specialty for [[Architects]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Reading]] is a power that [[Lucan]] uses to see the history of objects.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Reading]] requires openness and emotional empathy.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Reading is a process experienced by [[Calder]], serving as an extendable sense. He utilizes this ability constantly to maintain [[The Testament]] and communicate with the [[Lyathatan]]. [[Calder]] applies the technique to [[Imperial relics]] and uses it to activate the [[Optasia]]. Furthermore, the [[Gardener]] employs Reading by pressing palms against stone tiles to temporarily [[Awaken]] the material. Ultimately, this technique is capable of flooding a mind with [[Intent]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Reading]] is a process that [[Calder]] experiences.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] has been [[Reading]] constantly to communicate with the [[Lyathatan]] and hold [[The Testament]] together.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Reading]] is a sense [[Calder]] can extend.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] uses [[Reading]] on [[Imperial relics]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Reading]] is used to activate the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Reading]] is a technique used by the [[Gardener]] to press palms against stone tiles.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Reading]] can be used to temporarily [[Awaken]] stone.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Reading]] is a technique that can flood the mind with [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Reading is a technique used to observe or understand things by perceiving the feelings of others and seeing into human history and intent. This power can also be used to sense the intent of a specific location, a skill [[Lucan]] employs. While [[Ach'magut]] provided the education required to advance this ability, [[the Emperor]] utilized that same knowledge to [[construct]] an empire. Although [[Darius]] performed a brief Reading, the process eventually came to an end for [[Shera]]. However, practitioners must avoid directly reading [[Elders]], as facing such alien minds is a great taboo that risks insanity.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Reading]] is a power used to see into the depths of human [[Intent]] and history.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Reading]] is a technique used to perceive how others feel.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Reading]] is a technique [[Lucan]] uses.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Darius]]'s [[Reading]] was brief.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ach'magut]] provided the education needed to advance [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]] used the education provided by [[Ach'magut]] to build an empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Reading]] is a technique used to sense the [[Intent]] of a location.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Reading]] is a technique used to observe or understand things.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Reading]] [[Elders]] directly is a great taboo that risks insanity due to facing alien minds.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Reading]] is a process that ended for [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] plans to utilize the technique of Reading to extract the truth from [[Calder]], who possesses this very ability. This method allows a practitioner to sense ambient [[Intent]] within their surroundings and can be further amplified through the use of a device. While first generation [[Readers]] were able to understand foreign languages by interpreting the [[Intent]] behind words, the practice carries significant risks. Attempting to use Reading directly on [[Great Elders]] can result in a descent into asylum.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] intends to use [[Reading]] to find the truth from [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Reading]] can be used to sense ambient [[Intent]] in surroundings.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Reading]] is a technique that can be amplified by a device.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|First generation [[Readers]] could use [[Reading]] to understand other languages by reading the [[Intent]] behind words.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has the ability of [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Reading]] [[Great Elders]] directly can lead to an asylum.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Reading serves as a method for observing and understanding the fundamental nature of various elements, including the wind, the ground, or even human hearts. While it is a technique used by [[Witnesses]] to inspect individuals, certain practitioners like [[Lucan]] wear gloves to stifle their ability. This skill can be utilized as a weapon or to detect hidden traps, though intent does not easily cling to liquid. Additionally, characters such as [[Loreli]] employ Reading to sense the air surrounding them.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Reading]] is a method of observing and understanding the nature of things like the ground, wind, or even hearts.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Intent]] does not easily cling to liquid.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Witnesses]] use [[Reading]] to inspect people.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] wears a glove to stifle his [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Reading]] is a technique that can be used to detect traps or as a weapon.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] uses [[Reading]] to sense the air around her.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
